ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* Food Standards Agency ID for the venue */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the venue */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the venue */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate for geographical location */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate for geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "local_authority" INTEGER /* Local authority responsible for the venue */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a reference point (e.g., tourist attraction) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided by the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the venue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the venue's details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the venue (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_local_authority FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority") REFERENCES local_authorities ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the local authority's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the local authority */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the local authority office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Hotel, Restaurant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the category */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the category (for UI purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the venue (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the venue */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., user, external platform) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is from a verified user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the photo was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail version of the photo */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_photos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_photos_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_opening_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of opening hours */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue whose hours are defined */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time when the venue opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time when the venue closes */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the opening hours are for a holiday */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the opening hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_opening_hours_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue for which the contact is listed */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries related to the venue */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_contacts_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue to which the statistics belong */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the venue profile has received */,
  "bookings" INTEGER /* Number of bookings made through the platform */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Total count of reviews submitted for the venue */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the venue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_statistics_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
